WPEPlatform

API Version: 2.0

Library Version: 2.52.1

Type
InputPurpose

Generated by gi-docgen 2023.3

Enumeration

WPEPlatformInputPurpose

since: 2.0

Declaration 

enum WPEPlatform.InputPurpose

Description [src]

Describes primary purpose of the input widget.

This information is useful for on-screen keyboards and similar input methods to decide which keys should be presented to the user.

Available since: 2.0

Members

WPE_INPUT_PURPOSE_FREE_FORM

Allow any character.

  • Value: 0
  • Nickname: free-form
  • Available since: 2.0
WPE_INPUT_PURPOSE_ALPHA

Allow only alphabetic characters.

  • Value: 1
  • Nickname: alpha
  • Available since: 2.0
WPE_INPUT_PURPOSE_DIGITS

Allow only digits.

  • Value: 2
  • Nickname: digits
  • Available since: 2.0
WPE_INPUT_PURPOSE_NUMBER

Edited field expects numbers.

  • Value: 3
  • Nickname: number
  • Available since: 2.0
WPE_INPUT_PURPOSE_PHONE

Edited field expects phone number.

  • Value: 4
  • Nickname: phone
  • Available since: 2.0
WPE_INPUT_PURPOSE_URL

Edited field expects URL.

  • Value: 5
  • Nickname: url
  • Available since: 2.0
WPE_INPUT_PURPOSE_EMAIL

Edited field expects email address.

  • Value: 6
  • Nickname: email
  • Available since: 2.0
WPE_INPUT_PURPOSE_NAME

Edited field expects the name of a person.

  • Value: 7
  • Nickname: name
  • Available since: 2.0
WPE_INPUT_PURPOSE_PASSWORD

Like WPE_INPUT_PURPOSE_FREE_FORM, but characters are hidden.

  • Value: 8
  • Nickname: password
  • Available since: 2.0
WPE_INPUT_PURPOSE_PIN

Like WPE_INPUT_PURPOSE_DIGITS, but characters are hidden.

  • Value: 9
  • Nickname: pin
  • Available since: 2.0
WPE_INPUT_PURPOSE_TERMINAL

Allow any character, in addition to control codes.

  • Value: 10
  • Nickname: terminal
  • Available since: 2.0
